candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; appears to be the operating sales/revenue line.
Explicit total revenue line; suitable as a fallback/alternate reported revenue label across years.
COGS, not revenue.
Operating profit, not revenue.
Financial income, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for the reported revenue line. 'Total Revenue' is the clearest top-line label; 'Rental Income' is included as an alternate label because it is identical and may represent the reported revenue label in some periods.

candidates.why: Explicit cost of revenues / COGS line; matches direct operating costs.
This matches property-level operating costs and is identical to COGS, so it should be excluded from SG&A.
Explicit overhead/administrative expense line above operating profit; best SG&A match.
Administrative overhead component, but should not be used when the populated subtotal 'Administrative Expense' exists.

candidates.row_label: Unpaid Selling Price of Investment Property
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset/liability-related line, not SG&A.
Headcount metric, not an expense row.

variables.notes: An explicit populated SG&A-type row exists ('Administrative Expense'), so per rule it is selected alone. Excluded 'Operating Expenses of Properties' because it corresponds to direct property operating costs and aligns with COGS.
No dedicated research and development expense line is present on the provided income statement.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring interest component related to lease liabilities; appropriate to include in interest expense.
Primary recurring interest expense line; best core XINT component.
Financial expense but not explicitly interest; may include non-interest items, so lower priority.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of the lease interest line; should not be used together with the main line.
Balance sheet accrual, not income statement expense flow.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Selected the granular recurring interest expense components and excluded the supplemental duplicate. Excluded 'Other Financial Expense' because it is not explicitly interest and may contain non-interest finance items.

candidates.why: Best available shareholders' equity line; preferable to total equity when avoiding possible double count with minority interest.
Valid total equity fallback, but less preferred than shareholders' equity if minority interest could exist.
Shareholder count metric, not book equity.
Total balance sheet size, not equity.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for equity. 'Total Shareholders' Equity - Total' is preferred because it more clearly represents common/shareholder equity. 'Total Equity' is included as fallback if labels vary by year.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement subtotal, not a balance sheet minority interest/equity line.

variables.notes: No non-controlling interest / minority interest line is present on the provided balance sheet.
